mapper.select:
select a.dish_id as dishId, d.name as dishName, round(avg(a.manipulation_score), 2) as manipulationScoreAvg, round(avg(a.equal_score), 2) as equalScoreAvg, round(avg(a.satisfaction_score), 2) as satisfactionScoreAvg from tbl_dish_appraises a left join tbl_dish d on a.dish_id = d.id where 1 = 1
and d.name like concat('%', #{params.search}, '%')
group by a.dish_id, d.name order by max(a.create_time) desc
